objects.name: Analytic 1802
objects.description: Defender correlates a causal chain where a device transitions into USB debugging or file transfer mode after a physical connection event, followed by application installation, file replication, or execution originating from the USB interface rather than the application store ecosystem.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:MDMLog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: device USB mode change (charging to file transfer / debugging / accessory)

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: application installed from adb, sideload, or unknown USB source

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: large file write originating from /mnt/usb or external mounted storage

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Correlation window between USB connection state change and application installation.
List of devices legitimately allowed to use ADB debugging.
Approved enterprise apps allowed to install outside Google Play.
Volume of file writes from mounted external storage considered suspicious.
